arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s 2025 FIFA Club World Cup opponents confirmed
arts.sum: An exception to this limit applies to countries with multiple continental champions in the years leading up to the Club World Cup, which has benefited Brazilian teams (Palmeiras, Flamengo, Fluminense, and Botafogo) and Mexican teams (León, Monterrey, and Pachuca). The newly expanded 2025 Club World Cup, set to take place next summer in the United States, now has its full lineup of participating teams .
